XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER_PROPERTIES

typedef struct _XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER_PROPERTIES{
    DWORD dwPrivileges;
    WORD TeamMemberDataSize;
    BYTE TeamMemberData[XONLINE_MAX_TEAM_MEMBER_DATA_SIZE];
} XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER_PROPERTIES, *PXONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER_PROPERTIES;

Members

dwPrivileges
Flags from the XONLINE_TEAM_LIVE_PERMISSIONS enumeration representing the team member's privileges. See Remarks for more information.
TeamMemberDataSize
Size of the team member data, in bytes.
TeamMemberData
Block containing the team member data.

Remarks

When a team is created, the person who creates it is the team leader or administrator. The dwPrivileges member of the XONLINE_TEAM_MEMBER_PROPERTIES structure for the team administrator must be exactly equal to 0xFFFFFFFF. The team administrator can assign other members of the team these same privileges, making them administrators also. After a player or players have been assigned team administrator privileges, they may not change their privileges away from 0xFFFFFFFF or leave the team until someone else has been assigned administrator-level privileges.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

See Also

Xbox Live Structures, XOnlineTeamCreate, XOnlineTeamMemberRecruit, XOnlineTeamMemberRecruitByName, XOnlineTeamMemberSetProperties, XOnlineStringVerify
